name: China Vanadium Titano-Magnetite Mining Company Limited
summary: China Vanadium Titano-Magnetite Mining Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in mining and ore processing activities in the People's Republic of China. It operates through three segments: High-Fe Mining Operation; Trading; and Corporate and Others. The company engages in the operation of sale of self-produced products, and trading of coal and steel. It is also involved in the provision of specialized mining services; and management of strategic investments. In addition, the company engages in the iron ore and gypsum ore beneficiation activities, as well as provision of contract mining and construction consulting services. China Vanadium Titano-Magnetite Mining Company Limited was founded in 2004 and is based in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
